title: SQL basic arithmetic
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Float64, name String, is_active UInt8);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, name, is_active) VALUES (1, 1.5, 'Test', 1);
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE is_active = 1 AND id = 1;
SELECT IF(value > 1.0, 'Greater', 'Lesser') AS comparison FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: SQL basic arithmetic comparisons and boolean evaluations
